markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content production, quality, and performance strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Production Paused:** Production is paused for the first 2–3 weeks of January to clear Sunbit's backlog of 131 articles awaiting publication and 378 awaiting legal review.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
  - [**Quality Rework:** GrowthX will rework all articles submitted before mid-November to fix formatting issues, as Sunbit's internal pipelines were upgraded then.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
  - [**New Service:** GrowthX will now generate header images for articles, automating a key bottleneck in Sunbit's publishing workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [**2026 Strategy:** The January meeting will define 2026 goals (e.g., increasing Scrunch presence from 23% to 30%) and explore new formats like programmatic landing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)

## Topics

### Content Backlog & Quality Issues

  - [Sunbit's publishing workflow is bottlenecked by two stages:](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [**Legal Review:** 378 articles pending.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
      - [**Publishing:** 131 articles pending, with a target of 10/week.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** Quality issues in older articles (pre-mid-November) require extensive manual editing, slowing the entire process.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
      - [**Specific Issues:** Inconsistent formatting (e.g., bullet points), poor H-tag structure, and content that is too dense.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [**Solution:** A two-part plan to clear the backlog and improve efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
      - [**Pause Production:** GrowthX will pause new article delivery for the first 2–3 weeks of January.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
      - [**Rework Older Content:** GrowthX will take back all articles from Aug–Oct 2025 to fix formatting, reducing Sunbit's manual workload.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)

### Performance & 2026 Strategy

  - [**December Performance:** Off to a strong start, on pace to surpass November.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
      - [**Knowledge Center:** Automotive tips continue to outperform dental tips.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)
      - [**LLM Referrals:** Traffic is slowing, a trend seen across multiple GrowthX accounts. The impact of new models (e.g., GPT-5.2, Gemini 3) is TBD.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)
  - [**Competitive Analysis (Scrunch):**](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
      - [Sunbit's presence is 23%, up from 20% last week.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
      - [**Goal:** Increase presence to 30%+ in 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** The "Top Positions" metric is low (39%), indicating significant room to capture queries where competitors appear but Sunbit does not.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [**Future Initiatives:**](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
      - [**Sunbit.ai Content:** Jason requested technical articles for a new subdomain. Vivek will follow up on the delayed request.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
      - [**Programmatic Landing Pages:** Vivek proposed this format to augment blog content and reduce the compliance burden.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1987.0)
      - [**2026 Planning:** The January meeting will align on goals and strategy, leveraging the upcoming website redesign to boost web performance.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1987.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Vivek:**](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
      - [Pause new article production for the first 2–3 weeks of January.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
      - [Rework all articles from Aug–Oct 2025 to fix formatting.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
      - [Provide 2026 KPI guidance and projections for the January meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
      - [Follow up on the request for Sunbit.ai content.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
  - [**Angel:**](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
      - [Review recent articles (Nov–Dec 2025) to assess current quality.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
      - [Change the status of Aug–Oct 2025 articles to a "re-edit" label for GrowthX to retrieve.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
      - [Provide GrowthX with a Figma background or art direction for header image generation.](https://fathom.video/share/vhQpywpnMZrPC9Gq1br8fqixVzozTeEj?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
